nasb.text: Those who have insight will shine brightly like the brightness of the expanse of heaven, and those who lead the many to righteousness, like the stars forever and ever.

esv.text: And those who are wise shall shine like the brightness of the sky above; and those who turn many to righteousness, like the stars forever and ever.

cnv.text: 那些有智慧的必發光，好像穹蒼的光體；那些使許多人歸義的必發光，如同星星，直到永永遠遠。

ccb.text: 智者必发出光辉，如耀眼的穹苍；引导多人归向公义的人必如闪烁的星辰，直到永永远远。
